nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery was born in 1236, in Upton Scudamore, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of *E Henry de WOOLAVINGTON & COSSINGTON and *E MRS Henry de WOOLAVINGTON & COSSINGTON. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore.

ja.lifeSummary: Margeryは1236年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアウプトン スクウダモーで*E Henry de WOOLAVINGTON & COSSINGTONと*E MRS Henry de WOOLAVINGTON & COSSINGTONの娘として生まれた。彼女はPeter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamoreとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery(은)는 1236년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 업턴 스c다모어에서 *E Henry de WOOLAVINGTON & COSSINGTON(와)과 *E MRS Henry de WOOLAVINGTON & COSSINGTON의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Peter Scudamore - Lord of Upton Scudamore(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
